functions.name: craft_platforms.snap._build.get_default_architectures
documentation:
Get the default architectures for a given snap base.

```
param base

the snap base as a string (e.g. core24)

returns

A sequence of of DebianArchitecture objects containing the default
set of architectures to use if none are defined for this base.
```

functions.name: craft_platforms.snap._build.get_distro_base_from_core_base
documentation:
Get a DistroBase from a 'coreXX' base number.

```
param base

a string containing the base value

returns

A generic base object for the given snap base.
```

functions.name: craft_platforms.snap._build.get_snap_base
documentation:
Get the DistroBase for a snap based on its type, base and build_base.

The rules here are defined in ST119, but this only implements "timeless"
rules.

functions.name: craft_platforms.snap._build.get_platforms_snap_build_plan
documentation:
Generate the build plan for a platforms-based charm.

```
param base

The base string in snapcraft.yaml (or None if not given)

param build_base

The build-base string in snapcraft.yaml (or None if
not given)

param snap_type

One of "base", "kernel", "snapd"
```

variables.name: craft_platforms.charm._build.DEFAULT_ARCHITECTURES
documentation:
Default architectures for building a charm

If no platforms are defined, the charm will be built on and for these architectures.

classes.name: craft_platforms._errors.CraftError
documentation: A protocol for determining whether an object is a craft error.

classes.name: craft_platforms._errors.CraftPlatformsError

class_variables.name: craft_platforms._errors.CraftPlatformsError.message
documentation: The main message to the user about this error.

class_variables.name: craft_platforms._errors.CraftPlatformsError.details
documentation: The full error details which originated the error situation.

class_variables.name: craft_platforms._errors.CraftPlatformsError.resolution
documentation:
An extra line indicating to the user how the error may be fixed or avoided (to be
shown together with `message`).

class_variables.name: craft_platforms._errors.CraftPlatformsError.docs_url
documentation: An URL to point the user to documentation (to be shown together with `message`).

class_variables.name: craft_platforms._errors.CraftPlatformsError.doc_slug
documentation:
The slug to the user documentation. Needs a base url to form a full address.
Note that `docs_url` has preference if it is set.

class_variables.name: craft_platforms._errors.CraftPlatformsError.logpath_report
documentation:
Whether the location of the log filepath should be presented in the screen as the
final message.

class_variables.name: craft_platforms._errors.CraftPlatformsError.reportable
documentation: If an error report should be sent to some error-handling backend (like Sentry).

class_variables.name: craft_platforms._errors.CraftPlatformsError.retcode
documentation: The code to return when the application finishes.
Signal a program error with a lot of information to report.

classes.name: craft_platforms._errors.BuildForAllError
documentation: Errors related to build-for: all.

classes.name: craft_platforms._errors.AllOnlyBuildError
documentation: Error when multiple build-for architectures are defined, but one is 'all'.

classes.name: craft_platforms._errors.AllSinglePlatformError
documentation: Error when multiple build-for architectures are defined, but one is 'all'.

classes.name: craft_platforms._errors.NeedBuildBaseError
documentation: Error when `base` requires a `build_base`, but none is unspecified.

classes.name: craft_platforms._errors.InvalidPlatformNameError
documentation: Error when a specified platform name is not a Debian architecture.

classes.name: craft_platforms._errors.InvalidPlatformError
documentation: Error when a specified platform is invalid.

classes.name: craft_platforms._errors.InvalidBaseError
documentation: Error when a specified base name is invalid.

classes.name: craft_platforms._errors.RequiresBaseError
documentation: Error when a base is required in this configuration.

classes.name: craft_platforms._architectures.DebianArchitecture

methods.name: craft_platforms._architectures.DebianArchitecture.from_machine
documentation:
Get a DebianArchitecture value from the given platform arch.

```
param arch

a string containing an architecture as returned by platform.machine()

returns

The DebianArchitecture enum value

raises

ValueError if the architecture is not a valid Debian architecture.
```

methods.name: craft_platforms._architectures.DebianArchitecture.from_host
documentation: Get the DebianArchitecture of the running host.

methods.name: craft_platforms._architectures.DebianArchitecture.to_platform_arch
documentation:
Convert this DebianArchitecture to a platform string.

:returns: A string matching what platform.machine() or uname -m would return.
A Debian architecture.

functions.name: craft_platforms.rock._build.get_rock_build_plan
documentation:
Generate the build plan for a rock.

This function uses the default build planner, but filters it to prevent the use of
`build-for: all`

```
param base

the rock base (e.g. 'ubuntu@24.04')

param platforms

the platforms structure in rockcraft.yaml

param build_base

the build base, if provided in rockcraft.yaml.
```

functions.name: craft_platforms._distro._get_series_tuple
documentation: Convert a version string into a version tuple.

functions.name: craft_platforms._distro._get_distro
documentation: Get the distribution of a base.

functions.name: craft_platforms._distro._get_series
documentation: Get the version of a base.

functions.name: craft_platforms._distro.is_ubuntu_like
documentation:
Determine whether the given distribution is Ubuntu or Ubuntu-like.

```
param distribution

Linux distribution info object, or None to use the host system.

returns

A boolean noting whether the given distribution is Ubuntu or Ubuntu-like.
```

classes.name: craft_platforms._distro.BaseName
documentation:
A protocol for any class that can be used as an OS base.

This protocol exists as a backwards compatibility shim for the
language used in craft-providers.

classes.name: craft_platforms._distro.DistroBase

methods.name: craft_platforms._distro.DistroBase._ensure_bases_comparable
documentation:
Ensure that these bases are comparable, raising an exception if not.

```
param other

Another distribution base.

raises

ValueError if the distribution bases are not comparable.
```

methods.name: craft_platforms._distro.DistroBase.from_str
documentation:
Parse a distribution string to a DistroBase.

```
param base_str

A distribution string (e.g. "ubuntu@24.04")

returns

A DistroBase of this string.

raises

ValueError if the string isn't of the appropriate format.
```

methods.name: craft_platforms._distro.DistroBase.from_linux_distribution
documentation:
Convert a distro package's LinuxDistribution object to a DistroBase.

```
param distribution

A LinuxDistribution from the distro package.

returns

A matching DistroBase object.
```
A linux distribution base.
